reviews.review_description:
The game is far better than it's prequel in my opinion. It has amazing graphics, brilliant weapons and attachments, and a great storyline if a little basic. If I had to ask for one thing, it would be an animation for when you beat the game. Idk, per haps receiving a medal of honour or a trophy for the toy wall.
10/10 game, definitely get if you played the first zero caliber

reviews.review_title: 1 is still Superior to me at least
reviews.review_description: There are ups and downs to this game, a lot of the downs make me realize that ZCR might be a better game, almost like they tried too hard with this one. Some mechanics seem copy/paste from the 1st, though not the good ones. Modding your gun is better in this one, but the base game is lacking decent maps, especially for survival modes. And needing to "verify files" after each startup is so irritating, it seemingly takes almost 6 mins, when I want to play a quick round, I can't because I have to wait on a game I purchased. And stop trying to force the use of microphone, there are some people that play Solo, or friends only, and we have a better way to chat than through the headset. Fix some of these issues, I'll gladly change my rating.

This is the best vr shooter out now. The game is a proper cod like it has you going into multiple buildings in most levels, and the insides look great. For example, there is a town map where you have to clear multiple home buildings. Honestly, it's the best I have seen. 

There were some moments where I just had to stop in awe at my surroundings, like when you go into the cafe or the cult building during the city map.

Seriously ten out of ten brilliant shooter.

I love both games so far yes they are a bit buggy but still playable so far for me. I really wish there was a flashlight attachment to add to your weapon so it's not so dark I'm playing on an Oculus quest 2 with my oculus brightness all the way up and I can't see anything in some of the missions while my buddy on an Oculus quest 3 can change his brightness in game and can see way better than I can. I literally had to follow his every move to be able to get through the map cause all I could see is his gamer tag and I think adding a flashlight attachment would help combat the issue with not being able to change the brightness in game in my oculus quest 2

developer_response.body:
Hey!
Thank you for the feedback! I'll send you a DM and could you send me some pictures showing the brightness difference between your friend's Quest 3 and your Quest 2? I’ll document it as a bug. Also, regarding flashlights, we sadly might not be able to add them due to Quest 2 hardware limitations.

- tokio321HUN

reviews.review_description: Pretty much COD, but in vr. Guns feel good and are very mod-able. Unfortunately, some attachments are objectively better than others. I wish it was more balanced rather than having superior attachments. Campaign is pretty much just a Call of Duty campaign.

developer_response.body:
Hey Mr_Splode!
Thanks for the feedback! We’re glad to hear you’re enjoying the gunplay. Feel free to join our Discord and share your suggestions with us! Regarding the attachments, balancing them is tricky because they are designed to work just like in real life. And if they would be even more balance then there would be no reason to grind them for.

Discord server: https://discord.gg/xrealgames
- tokio321HUN

reviews.review_description: it's an amazing game perfect if you want to be in a war and have your own weapons that you customized to your liking but one thing I kinda wish that the developers add was a way to reset your progress so you can replay it without having to scroll back to the beginning level and have to remember where you left off but other than that it's a good game I recommend playing it if you haven't already

reviews.review_title: Edit, hands down best shooter vr game
reviews.review_description:
Out of all the shooter vr games zero cal is the best,
 Hands down,feels like your in call of duty, I have contactors, ghost of tabor , pavlock and pretty much all the others I have bought and this and zero cal 2 are so fun,if your looking for that call of duty feel this is the game 🎮

Wouldn't pay full price. The modding community is dead/non existent but there are a couple. Really only worth it for the campaign but expect to get sniped across the map constantly and have objectives not activate. It's not awful, it's a big step up from the first game. If you don't care about single player campaign, save your money and buy Contractors.

Very good game, I'd recommend anyone with a VR headset to buy it, clean controls and easy to get behind fun gameplay, overall 10/10. But for some reason when I try to load the mission "saltbreak city" the game just crashes and sends me back to the Meta menu area. I'm still not sure if this is an issue with my headset or the game, but if it's the latter it'd be greatly appreciated if you could find what's behind this and fix it.

If I were somebody who thinks about getting this game, I would wait a couple months for them to fix some stuff, the game is great. I played the first one and was excited for the second one and it’s a lot of fun, but the game gets so unbelievably laggy in the last couple of levels that it is completely unplayable if the devs see this, please please please find a way that it is better on standalone oculus(I’m not even on an old oculus. I’m on a quest three)

developer_response.body:

Hey!

Could you provide some further information about which mission is lags for you or when is it getting laggy?

I really hope there is a Zero Cal 3 some day. I will buy it sight unseen. Keep it up. I love this game.

reviews.review_title: A fun shooter but not quite AAA
reviews.review_description: I'm having fun playing this shooter, about half way through the campaign and think its pacing is quite good. But at times I feel it tries to rush things along a bit too fast, especially if the squad runs off and alerts the enemy whilst I'm planning things out. So feel the squad can be more of a hindrance than help and wish you could turn them off. I don't know much about guns so wish there was information at the base that explained how all the attachments improved the guns and how they are different. Or doesn't it matter that much, and they're all basically the same? Like there are so many different lasers, holo-sights, optical sights, silencers / suppressors etc, how are each different to each other? And explanations on how each gun performs better to another, or its unique features. Also I don't get why when you load a new magazine you have to use the trigger button to pull back the bolt to load it? as the grip button makes more sense to me and is what I keep trying to press, as you use the grip button for everything else. The graphics are ok on Quest 3 but I really expected more. I think games like Metro, Sniper Elite, Arizona Sunshine Remake look way better. Also there's not much interaction with anything in the environment, almost everything in the game is baked in and not even destructible.
Replaceable campaign, go at your own pace, and have FUN!
Amazing game but I preorder it and I never got the skin for the preorder gun and I don’t know hot to contact them so I can get it.

Enjoy the game. Buuut. Mechanic are gimpy. Especially grab mechanics. Holstering cocking ur gun. Grabbing mags. Etc. please fix this. Very frustrating to have all these gimps in a fairly expensive game.

developer_response.body:
Hey!
Thank you for the feedback! Could you send me some details in DM why does it feels gimpy? It would help us a lot if we could know exactly why it feels that way. Then that way i can forward the message to the Developers.

reviews.review_description:
I just logged onto the game today and saw all of my progress is gone, which was very irritating because I was og I had all weapons and unlocks then I comeback after seeing the new update just to be hit with a tutorial and all my progress wiped. 10/10 game, but I just hate to see that all of my stuff is gone😔

-Edit: I'm not saying the game is bad

First of all the game I love the game and find it very enjoyable. The first suggestion I have it was to add the back slot to the load out. Along with this I think you should make the side slot pistol only as it is more realistic. I also think all things you can add to your grenade slot during the round you can add to your load-out. For example you should be able to put Epi pens or accessories like extra barrels or scopes. Additionally I think you should make the automatic healing either significantly slower or take it out completely. If you take it out you should make Epi pens a lot more common or add something like a medkit that’s not instant and can’t revive you when you are dead. Also you should be allowed to have as many loadouts as you would like but in only take a limited number into game at a time. So you could have a lot of loud outs for different things but you can only have 3 loud outs that you can switch between during the game. The final recommendation is to add similar climbing ability’s as zero caliber reloaded or ladders or such to building to make sniping easier.

developer_response.body:
Hey Jakob!

I hear your feedback and suggestions! Thank you for sharing them with us <3
I will document these and pass along to the devs.
Until then, please consider joining our Discord server if you would like to stay updated on our games!
https://discord.gg/xrealgames

reviews.review_title: A worthy successor...if it was finished.
reviews.review_description:
ZC 2 has a lot going on for it - decent voice acting, immersive environments, GUNS, and I mean GUNS galore. There's also a much better fleshing out of the story than the first game and Reloaded. 

The problem with ZC2 is...it's not finished. There wasn't QC done to the game before release. It feels like a hodgepodge of good ideas with no unifying effect.

The game tends to glitch. Every mission. Usually multiple times. For example, in the first mission, you're probably going to have to restart several times because you can't open a case for a weapon.

In the second mission - and keep in mind, getting into a vehicle was never explained - you CAN get into a vehicle, but then it glitches and the vehicle freezes. If you don't, the vehicle continues and then gets stopped. 

There's a lot of potential for ZC2, but at this point I should be paid for finding mistakes.

developer_response.body:
Edit: Hey! In the meantime a new update is live with loads of QoL improvements! Could you please play with this latest patch and let us know if you still find issues? 

Hi,
Glad you enjoy ZC2, but sorry to hear you found issues.
We know about the weapon case issue in the tutorial can occur in some rare cases. Working on a patch already that addresses issues as well, but until then tutorial is not mandatory, so you can progress to the real missions without completing it. 
We are still working really hard on improving the experience to a bugless state and if you can name any other examples for issues with description is always a huge help for us, so we can work on those asap as well. Have you played in single player when the vehicle problem occured or were you playing in coop?
Thanks for being supportive and hope you stay tuned!
Mark
XREAL Games

reviews.review_description: This game isn't perfect, but there is a lot of fun to be had. My time has been spent in multiple campaign playthroughs both in single player and co-op, the defender mode, and holiday challenges. The jank is primarily in the climbing and zip lines. The weapons feel great and the graphics and effects aren't amazing, but good. The story is OK, but the beginning of the story is muddy to me, and I'm not sure my character's presence in this makes a great deal of sense. Got the game on release day and still hop into a mission or two now and then with Snow Ghost being my favorite.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the helpful information, Phaenomenal!

I will document these issues and pass them along to the devs. If you have any more issues or suggestions, please join our Discord server and share them with us!
https://discord.gg/xrealgames

-tokio321HUN

reviews.review_title: Not as fun as the original Zero Caliber
reviews.review_description:
Something is missing in ZC2. I believe its the fact that most missions feel more like a walking simulator, with one or two enemies here and there.

I just played a mission where at one point we need to hold and defend a house in the middle of a war zone. Enemies were:
- 2 soldiers (easy kill) followed by one tank (easy to kill and almost non threatening)
- pause
- 2 soldiers from a helicopter
- pause
- 2 soldiers plus one tank

That was it. 6 guys and a couple easy tanks that cannot kill you if they try.

Its been a while since I played ZC1, but I distinctly remember there being lots and lots of enemies. I remember being forced to take cover, to feel overwhelmed and battle stressed.

I'm almost to the end of ZC2 and haven't felt this a single time. It feels more like taking a stroll and occasionally having to fire at someone.

Its a shame, I really enjoyed ZC1 and was looking forward to ZC2. Whatever happened - don't give up, devs. The potential is there, just needs some polish and a bit of rework so it feels like you're actually going to war.

developer_response.body:
Hey Charlie!

Thank you for your helpful feedback! I will document your issues. Are there any more issues that you encountered, or any suggestions for what you feel is missing from the game?

reviews.review_description:
This game suffers from a lot of bugs in multiplayer. Lag really bad it's very repetitive and a lot of players hacked and the players who don't. They probably play 14 hours a day on this game

Things that should be added 
They should add a system where players can play against other players of similar skill levels. I should add customization to guns. They should add classes personally and also ban people for hacking your voting system sucks. Nobody gets voted out and everybody knows that
I'm not a big gamer so I like when I can get to the end of a game...but there is a glitch that prevents getting the silo key in last sene.  Is there a fix for this?

I recommend this game because it has high end graphics, 6 - 8 hour campaign, multiplayer, and enhanced AI 🤖. I also love This game because of the realistic reloading and smooth game mechanics 🧰 .
      
      I personally like this game because it provides Easter eggs like little zombie figures around the campaign maps, and it has nice character models. 👾
     
           The only bad thing about this game, isn’t really bad but is kinda annoying, the base game by itself is 20 gigabytes and for me I think that is way to much storage. 😬

         But all of the game size aside, it’s a really great game for its price and I think it’s a buy! 🫵💵

developer_response.body:
Hey!

Thank you for your feedback! We are glad to hear you enjoy the game. I also noted your issue with the game size! If you would like to hear more about our titles and updates, please join our Discord server!

reviews.review_description: I played the entire campaign. I had fun every step of the way. The multi-player was only ok. That's because currently im having more fun playing with bots then actual people.  And thats because the guns are not balanced. The only 1 shot guns should be snipers and some shot guns. Overall I enjoyed my experience

Honestly, this was a stellar game. There’s so many bugs and glitches that it’s not worth playing. It’ll kick you out of a game and won’t let you join back in because the game hasn’t realized what it did! Compound that with when it glitches..all you can do is quit the game…as I said, this WAS an amazing game. It had wicked game play. It was well thought out…it was worth it

developer_response.body:
Hi,
Sorry if you experienced issues like that. 
We are here to hear as much feedback as possible to make ZC2 even better along the way! our next update  is coming real soon, but we need to get more details about your recent disconnection and glitches you mentioned! I shot you a friend request on Meta Horizon so we could chat or you can also use support@xrealgames.com or our Discord channel any time! Mark
XREAL Games

reviews.review_description: The one thing missing in VR is a fun multi-player shooter campaign and ZC2 fills that niche perfectly. My brother and I live on opposite coasts of the US so VR is how we hang. This campaign was 100% worth the price and was a great break from round based play like Onward. Highly recommend.

I have played this game twice over in this game trying to unlock everything. Getting yourself to level 100 is only the beginning. Multiplayer is still running strong even after all this time. Many people prefer the second game over this one, but I like both games equally well.

Beats any shooter game from video consoles. 
-the immersion level is great
-the graphics are excellent(for Quest 3 capability)
-the enemy's AI is pretty good and challenging
-the coop and multiplayer experience is unique.

In conclusion, I'm happy for every cent I paid for this game.
Well done, developers 👏🏼👏🏼👏🏼

If you just want a quick release of shooting action craving, this one is for you. Doesn't require too much strategizing, just plain out shooting action that could be challenging enough if you want or could be quick and easy if you just want to blast out.

I want to play this, I bought it. But the ammo just is too difficult to do. I can’t get a refund because I played too much of reloaded and I got the bundle for this just now.   Please add in a reload button and auto climb.
Fun very good cinematic

reviews.review_description: Excellent vr game. But recently I’m stuck permanently in the crouching position and cant move quickly enough in the game. Have tried to uninstall and reinstall the game but it’s still the same. Anyone got any advice.

developer_response.body:
Hey hey!

We are sorry to hear that you encountered this issue. I will document the bug and let the devs know about the problem! Thank you for sharing it with us.

Just to make sure I have all the necessary details for the report:
Which headset are you using?
Does the bug still appear in the current version?
Have you tried recalibrating your height or reset your playspace?

- tokio321HUN

reviews.review_title: Could be great, but still full of bugs
reviews.review_description: These developers have a tendency to leave things unfinished or abandoned (the PCVR build of the first game for example). This game is great when it's working. But the level of glitches which are gaming breaking, especially in later levels in co-op is alarming. The level of frustration just trying to find a key when it hasn't spawned for example. It's like the host player has to trigger all the actions or it won't progress. The level where you're injured for example, the host is playing the narrative injured and ready to be healed, but the second co-op player is unaffected. For the time the game has been released it's still fundamentally broken. I enjoyed single player with a few glitches. But in co-op the game is so broken it's almost unplayable. The first one is actually a better experience, albeit with worse graphics.

developer_response.body:
Hi,
Sorry to hear you found issues playing coop. We would need all the details for the bugs, so we could fix them asap. Would you mind sharing it to support@xrealgames.com ?
Also, shot you a friend request on Meta Horizon, so we could also chat quickly if you have some time.

reviews.review_title: My Best VR Game Ever (Besides Alyx)
reviews.review_description: A fun game until you get to the silo/key glitch.

The game is really great everything is very well built. Some reviews complain about the  boundary but it’s not true just hold down the meta quest button to reposition. Another thing I wanted to say is that I was really hoping for (since it’s in the pc vr version)was character customisation options I’m not sure if it is in the game and I don’t know where to look but if it isn’t in the game I think it would be a great feature to add.

Thanks for your time,
